Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly discusses 'labor law,' 'policy-making,' 'policy recommendations,' and 'government's role,' which directly supports strengthening institutions and the rule of law in the labor sector (Targets 16.3, 16.6, 16.b).
